test_cases.scenario: Scenario 1: Both providers running - Ollama + LM Studio APIs both respond, opencode.json contains both ollama and lmstudio providers
test_cases.evidence: Test 'should generate config with both Ollama and LM Studio models' passed: verifies both provider.ollama and provider.lmstudio exist in generated opencode.json with correct npm, name, baseURL, and models fields

test_cases.scenario: Scenario 2: Ollama only - LM Studio ECONNREFUSED, opencode.json generated without lmstudio key
test_cases.evidence: Test 'should generate config with Ollama only when LM Studio is not running' passed: verifies provider.ollama exists, provider.lmstudio is undefined

test_cases.scenario: Scenario 3: LM Studio only - Ollama down, opencode.json generated without ollama key
test_cases.evidence: Test 'should generate config with LM Studio only when Ollama is not running' passed: verifies provider.ollama is undefined, provider.lmstudio exists with correct models

test_cases.scenario: Scenario 4: Both providers down - Both APIs ECONNREFUSED, opencode.json not generated
test_cases.evidence: Tests 'should not generate opencode.json when both providers have 0 models' and 'should not generate opencode.json when APIs succeed but return 0 models [S2-003]' both passed: verifies writeFileSync not called

test_cases.scenario: Scenario 5: opencode.json already exists - file present, API not called, skip
test_cases.evidence: Test 'should skip if opencode.json already exists' passed: verifies writeFileSync and fetch not called

test_cases.scenario: Scenario 6: LM Studio API timeout - AbortError handled, Ollama side works normally
test_cases.evidence: Test 'should handle LM Studio API timeout' passed (fetchLmStudioModels returns {}), plus ensureOpencodeConfig integration tests with setupMockFetch show LM Studio reject does not affect Ollama

test_cases.scenario: Scenario 7: LM Studio model count limit - 100 model cap enforced
test_cases.evidence: Test 'should limit models to MAX_LM_STUDIO_MODELS' passed: 150 models input, output <= 100 models

test_cases.scenario: Scenario 8: Path traversal defense - invalid worktreePath throws error
test_cases.evidence: Tests 'should throw on path traversal detection [D4-004]' and 'should throw if path is not a directory [D4-004]' both passed

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: LM Studioが起動している場合、そのモデル一覧がopencode.jsonに反映されること
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: fetchLmStudioModels() correctly fetches from LM_STUDIO_API_URL, validates model IDs with LM_STUDIO_MODEL_PATTERN, and ensureOpencodeConfig() includes lmstudio provider in config

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: LM Studioが未起動の場合、エラーにならずOllamaのみで動作すること
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: Test 'should generate config with Ollama only when LM Studio is not running': ECONNREFUSED handled gracefully, opencode.json generated with ollama only

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: Ollamaが未起動の場合、エラーにならずLM Studioのみで動作すること
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: Test 'should generate config with LM Studio only when Ollama is not running': ECONNREFUSED handled gracefully, opencode.json generated with lmstudio only

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: 両方未起動の場合も、致命的エラーにならないこと
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: Test 'should not generate opencode.json when both providers have 0 models': resolves without error, no writeFileSync call

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: OllamaとLM Studioの両方が未起動で取得モデル数が0件の場合、opencode.jsonは生成しないこと（SF-004）
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: Two tests verify: both ECONNREFUSED case and both return empty arrays case - writeFileSync not called in either

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: ユニットテスト・結合テストがすべてパスすること
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: 48/48 tests passed in opencode-config.test.ts. TypeScript type check passed (npx tsc --noEmit). ESLint passed (no warnings or errors). 3 failed test files (5 tests) are pre-existing failures in app-version-display.test.tsx and RepositoryManager.test.tsx, unrelated to Issue #398

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: 既存のOllamaのみの動作に影響がないこと
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: All pre-existing Ollama tests pass: fetchOllamaModels tests (9 tests), OLLAMA_MODEL_PATTERN tests (5 tests), constants tests (3 Ollama constants). Implementation uses additive changes only (new fetchLmStudioModels + provider merge logic)

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: LM Studioモデルのスケジュール実行（非インタラクティブモード）はスコープ外
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: No changes to claude-executor.ts or schedule-manager.ts. LM Studio integration is limited to opencode-config.ts (config file generation only)

quality_checks.pre_existing_failures: 3 test files (5 tests) failed - all unrelated to Issue #398 (app-version-display.test.tsx, RepositoryManager.test.tsx)

message: すべての受入条件を満たしています。LM Studio プロバイダーの統合が正しく実装され、既存のOllama機能への影響もありません。
